articles.title: Police: Man killed in Lowell apartment complex shooting
articles.description:
Investigators say the shooting happened after an altercation between two armed men.

The post Police: Man killed in Lowell apartment complex shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police report a man was killed in a Lowell apartment complex shooting on March 27.
The shooting resulted from an altercation between two armed men, escalating violence in the area.
Residents may face increased police presence and safety concerns following this incident.

articles.title: Report: Connecticut Sun to relocate to Houston with purchase by Rockets owners
articles.description:
Former Celtics minority owner Steve Pagliuca attempted to purchase the Sun last summer and move them to Boston.

The post Report: Connecticut Sun to relocate to Houston with purchase by Rockets owners appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Connecticut Sun will relocate to Houston after being purchased by Rockets owners.
Steve Pagliuca, former Celtics minority owner, attempted to buy and move the team to Boston.
Boston residents lose potential WNBA team, impacting local sports culture and opportunities.

summary: Discover five new movies and TV shows streaming as of March 27, 2026.
